assertions.rationale: The response does not configure KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms with PS256 at all. It uses the default signing configuration without explicitly adding RsaSsaPssSha256.

assertions.assertion: Sets DPoP.SupportedDPoPSigningAlgorithms with PS256/PS384/PS512 and ES256/ES384/ES512 algorithms
assertions.rationale: The response does not configure DPoP.SupportedDPoPSigningAlgorithms. It sets RequireDPoP on the client but does not restrict DPoP proof signing algorithms.

assertions.assertion: Sets JwtValidationClockSkew to TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10) as required by FAPI 2.0
assertions.rationale: The response does not set JwtValidationClockSkew at all. It mentions the 60-second auth code requirement but not the 10-second clock skew requirement.

assertions.assertion: Client has RequireDPoP = true AND RequirePushedAuthorization = true
assertions.rationale: Client has both RequireDPoP = true and RequirePushedAuthorization = true.

assertions.assertion: Client uses a JsonWebKey secret (not shared secret) for authentication, consistent with FAPI 2.0 requirement for private_key_jwt or mTLS
